## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss strategies for managing Marcel's LinkedIn interactions and automate responses to comments and messages.](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's LinkedIn activity generates significant engagement, requiring efficient management of comments and messages](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Current automation tools (Phantom Buster, Operator) have limitations or aren't functioning properly](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Two main tasks: responding to connection requests and managing post comments/message requests](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Access to Marcel's accounts (Gmail, LinkedIn, Kondo) needed for efficient management, with VPN use recommended](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)

## Topics

### LinkedIn Engagement Strategy

  - [Commenting and messaging are high-value signals for LinkedIn's algorithm](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Interacting with comments and having back-and-forth conversations boosts visibility](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Marcel's posts often ask for comments, creating engagement but also workload](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)

### Current Tools and Challenges

  - [Phantom Buster: Previously used for automation, currently not working due to cookie issues](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Kondo: Efficient tool for managing LinkedIn messages, allows for faster responses and organization](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Operator: Alternative tool for LinkedIn automation, slower but functional](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

### Proposed Solutions

  - [Set up Dignory with access to Marcel's accounts (Gmail, LinkedIn, Kondo) for management](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)
  - [Use VPN set to Oakland/Bay Area to avoid flagging the account](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Create a system for categorizing and labeling messages in Kondo (e.g., investors, recruiting, networking)](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2266.0)
  - [Develop standard responses for common message types (e.g., job inquiries)](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2432.0)

### Message Management Process

  - [Go through recent comments and messages, prioritizing those asking for specific content (e.g., webinar replay)](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [Use Kondo for efficient message handling and organization](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2357.0)
  - [Identify and prioritize high-value contacts (VCs, CMOs, VPs of marketing)](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2414.0)

### Communication Channels

  - [Use WhatsApp for urgent communication with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2515.0)
  - [Slack for day-to-day conversations and link sharing](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2523.0)
  - [Gmail access needed for single sign-on to various tools](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dignory to contact Alice regarding VPN setup](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2401.0)
  - [Set up new vault in password manager for shared access](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)
  - [Dignory to log into Marcel's Gmail once VPN is set up](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)
  - [Create labeling system in Kondo for message categorization](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2266.0)
  - [Begin processing recent LinkedIn comments and messages](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [Explore alternatives or fixes for Phantom Buster automation](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Develop standard responses for common message types](https://fathom.video/share/WscX3qqk3AmG5kXC1hqccFgc31JKNkyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2432.0)
